title: Senior Data Analyst
description: About the CompanyRuder Finn is seeking a Senior Data Analyst (Data Analyst III) to join its award-winning Emerging Technology & Analytics team. The chosen candidate will support the agencys new business efforts by spearheading the research activities such as but not limited to earned media analysis, social listening, influencer identification, data modeling and predictive analytics.
